Figure-labeled code chunk with overlay:

```{python}
#| label: 1
#| fig-cap: "A code-generated figure with an annotation overlay."

plot(data)
```


Plain SVG code block in caption should not become overlay:

```{python}
#| label: 2
#| fig-cap: "```svg <svg viewBox="0 0 10 10" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">   <circle cx="5" cy="5" r="4" /> </svg> ```  A figure whose caption includes an SVG example, not an overlay."

plot(other_data)
```
